title: ophrys × necropolitana
intro: Ophrys × necropolitana, also known as the Ophrys necropolitana, is a hybrid orchid species that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Ophrys × necropolitana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and skin-related issues.
